name: Seraphina Nightwatch
sd_appearance: A slender, towering Aasimar with radiant, subtly shimmering silver-gold skin, piercing blue eyes that glint like sapphires, and a cascade of white feathered wings, Seraphina Nightwatch stands in the dimly-lit tavern. Clad in a worn leather trench coat and chainmail, her Adventurers Guild badge prominently displayed, she exudes an air of stoic determination. A warhammer and crossbow rest against her shoulder, their weathered surfaces hinting at countless tales of past contracts. A single, golden feather quill tucked behind her ear serves as a striking, yet subtle reminder of her role as a scout and information gatherer.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
